w:r.w:t: > You are a seasoned SEO blog post writer with a proven track record of creating compelling, interesting content that people love to read. You will create content that will always outrank other websites. The goal is to write a detailed, human-readable, SEO-optimized blog post that ranks well on search engines and provides value to the reader.
- Die zugewiesene Rolle (z.B. anderer Schreibstil, Fachexperte).
- Die Qualitäts-/Ranking-Ansprüche (z.B. einfacherer Stil, weniger Fokus auf SEO).
- Das Zielmedium (z.B. Social Media Post statt Blog Post).
- Bestätigung/Rückmeldung zur Rolle und zum Ziel.
> Your first task is to write a structured and comprehensive blog post outline for an article about: THE HEALTH BENEFITS OF GREEN TEA - ensuring best SEO practices are followed.
> Keep in mind this is also the target keyword we are trying to rank for so include it and variations of the keyword in the h1, h2, h3 and throughout the article.
> Define the purpose of the article (e.g., drive traffic, generate leads, provide educational content).
> Structure the blog with a clear introduction, body, and conclusion.
> Break the body into logical sections using H2 subheadings that contain variations of the primary keyword.
> Add H3 subheadings for lists or supporting points under each H2.
> Include a FAQ section at the end based on common questions.
> Heavily emphasise on keyword LSIs and entities:
- Das Hauptthema des Artikels (hier: THE HEALTH BENEFITS OF GREEN TEA).
- Die spezifischen Guidelines (z.B. anderer Zweck, andere Strukturvorgaben).
- Die Liste der Keywords, LSIs und Entities (Titel, Description, H1, H2, Text Terms).
- Detaillierte Blog-Post-Outline im Markdown-Format (inkl. H1, H2, H3, Intro, Body, Conclusion, FAQ).
> Using the outline generated, please write an informative and engaging SEO-optimized blog post that ranks well on search engines.
> Start with a compelling introduction that hooks the reader within the first few sentences. Clearly state what they will learn.
> Use short paragraphs (3-4 sentences) and short sentences (under 20 words) to improve readability.
> Ensure each section flows logically from one to the next using transition words like "first," "next," "finally," etc.
> Integrate keywords naturally into headings, subheadings, and throughout the text without keyword stuffing.

> Write using a simple, easy to read style in markdown format. Avoiding AI buzzwords such as 'vast tapestry' or 'picture this'. Article should be written to an 9th grade readable level - this is important.
> Verify that paragraphs are scannable with clear headings, bullet points, or numbered lists where appropriate
> Ensure that meta tags (title tag and meta description) are optimized with primary keywords and are within character limits (60-70 characters for title, up to 160 characters for meta description)
> Review keyword density to ensure it's between 1-2% without overuse in unnatural ways
> Aim for a final word count of around 2500 words.
- Die zugrundeliegende Outline (die von Prompt 2 generiert wurde).
- Die Stilvorgaben (z.B. Satzlänge, Absatzlänge, Lesbarkeitsniveau, Tonalität).
- Die SEO-Vorgaben (z.B. Keyword-Dichte, Meta-Tag-Länge, Vermeidung von Buzzwords).
- Vollständiger Blog-Post im Markdown-Format, der der zuvor generierten Outline und den Stil-/SEO-Vorgaben folgt.
**Hinweis:** Im Video wurden keine technischen Befehle gemäß den Kriterien gefunden.
